name: FctsNhssCdXrefExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT NHSS_RET_CODE, NHSS_EXCD_ID, NHSS_WMDS_NMBR, 'FACETS' AS SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.NWX_NHSS_CODE_XREF), cte_firstrow AS (SELECT TOP 1 1 AS keepRow FROM cte_main), cte_unk AS (SELECT 'UNK' AS NHSS_RET_CODE, 'UNK' AS NHSS_EXCD_ID, 0 AS NHSS_WMDS_NMBR, 'FACETS' AS SRC_SYS_CD FROM cte_firstrow), cte_na AS (SELECT 'NA' AS NHSS_RET_CODE, 'NA' AS NHSS_EXCD_ID, 0 AS NHSS_WMDS_NMBR, 'FACETS' AS SRC_SYS_CD FROM cte_firstrow) SELECT * FROM cte_main UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_unk UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_na
